hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [[ -n "$cmd" ]] && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^\s*(find|grep|egrep|fgrep|rg|awk|sed)\b' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qP '/nix/store(?!/[a-z0-9]{32}-)'; then jq -n '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Searching /nix/store/ directly is not allowed - use nix eval to resolve store paths instead."}}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^\s*nix-build\b' && echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'compat\.nix'; then jq -n '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"nix-build repo/compat.nix is for legacy tooling only — use nix build .#<attr> instead."}}'; fi
